bead.title: prompts: reorder buildPrompt for Anthropic prefix-cache compatibility (deferred)
bead.description: buildPrompt (execute_bead.go:1392-1461) currently puts dynamic bead first, static instructions last — Anthropic prefix cache cannot help. Reorder. Separate change with own review (deferred from main S12 batch).
bead.acceptance: 1. buildPrompt puts static instructions first, dynamic last. 2. Cache hit rate measurable (telemetry). 3. Tests cover the new layout.
